name: Chronically under-watered
_note: Phase B (adaptive amount loop). A consistent-moisture plant (ideal 4–7) that the user keeps giving just 1 cup — every post-watering reading only reaches 4, well below the top of the band, so each cycle grades as 'under'. The outcome loop should climb the recommended amount above the 1 cup being poured (telling the user to give more), rather than echoing their too-small habit (#64's gap) or trusting the fragile α guess. Timestamps anchored to fixed dates for determinism.
